collected.policy_snippet: Dietary habits; Food, drink, and medications you consume (including as submitted via voice logging) and purchase (via our grocery integrations); Calorie count; Dietary restrictions; Fitness level, activity, and goals (e.g. weekly goals or habits like eat more protein); Lifestyle information (e.g., sleeping data); Body measurements (e.g., height, weight, and BMI); Information related to any physiological conditions; Progress photos you may choose to provide; and Other information you might choose to submit in the notes (e.g. observations and reflections about your progress and mindset).
collected.purpose: To provide our Services, improve the quality of our Services, and personalize content and features to your interests and goals.
